name: Your Girlfriend Is Leaving You For A Guy With Higher Power In "Rise Of Kingdoms"
description: Everyone knows that your self worth depends of your Rise of Kingdoms power level. You used to be the guy with the highest power level at school, and that why Stella, the most popular girl was dating you. But now that the new guy, Brad, got a higher power level than you, he's stealing your girl.
creator: NotMyBestPicture
